text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember when all the Mejiro kids
used to play together? We'd have races
in the garden and go to summer festivals
together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, we did fireworks
on the estate grounds too, didn't we?
We had our little sparklers in hand and
smiles on our faces.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, I remember that! We had the adults
set off the big fireworks. It was a great night…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Dober, you were scared of the loud noises,
weren't you? I remember seeing you cling
to Ryan. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I… I was just a bit startled! Only a little!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, they were pretty ear-popping.
No one blames you for being scared!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That was when we were kids!
I'm okay with fireworks now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
…Actually, now that you mention it,
why don't we have another big fireworks
show at the Mejiro estate?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nice idea! Let's put on an even bigger,
more impressive show this time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like the house will be getting
lively again. Hehe, I can't wait.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Good… I can show you both
how much I've grown!
